name: API Tester Pro
description: Premium API testing workspace for REST, GraphQL and WebSocket workflows.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https: http:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'
